drift_detection_rules.rule: dashboard must be generated from .beads/issues.jsonl and capability inventory markdown
all TOKIO-REPLACE tracks T1..T9 must be present with stable root bead mapping
evidence completeness must be recomputed from in-repo artifact existence
unresolved blocker chains must be derived from live dependency edges (excluding parent-child)
JSON and markdown artifacts must be emitted from the same in-memory payload

promotion_criteria: dashboard artifacts are regenerated and committed
tokio_parity_dashboard contract tests pass in CI
rollback_or_exception_criteria: if hard-fail triggers, block promotion and open/append remediation bead comments
exceptions require explicit owner approval and follow-up bead with due date
nightly failures must be triaged before next release promotion window
